Spikes"}],["$","p","30",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["K2's most significant technical contribution may be the MuonClip optimizer, which enabled training a trillion-parameter model without a single catastrophic loss spike—a feat previously considered nearly impossible at this scale."]}],["$","h4","32",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Why Loss Spikes Matter:"}],["$","p","34",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Large model training is notoriously unstable. A single loss spike can corrupt days of training progress, requiring expensive checkpoint rollbacks. For a model the size of K2, each day of training costs approximately $500K in compute."]}],["$","h4","36",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"How MuonClip Works:"}],["$","p","38",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["MuonClip combines two innovations:"]}],["$","ol","41",{"style":{"margin":"20px 0","paddingLeft":"24px","color":"#d4d4d4"},"children":[["$","li","39",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Muon Algorithm: A second-order optimization method that accounts for curvature in the loss landscape"}],["$","li","40",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"QK-Clip Stability Mechanism: Clips query-key dot products to prevent attention explosion"}]]}],["$","p","42",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["The result: K2 trained through 15.5 trillion tokens without a single irrecoverable loss event. This stability directly translated to cost savings and training completion confidence."]}],["$","h3","44",{"style":{"fontSize":"24px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"36px","marginBottom":"16px","color":"#22d3ee"},"children":"Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA) Evolution"}],["$","p","46",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Kimi's MLA implementation builds on DeepSeek's innovation but extends it for even longer contexts:"]}],["$","h4","48",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Memory transfers"}],["$","li","51",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Enables 256K context on standard GPU
